method: The staleness signal is a pure function of the pending-learnings count, the guide's last-refresh timestamp, and config/learnings-cadence.json. This demonstration forces an over-threshold condition (fired), captures the badge and the /api/staleness payload, then performs a refresh bringing pending back under the threshold (cleared) and captures the cleared state. Both payloads are produced by the same computeStaleness module that serves GET /api/staleness on the deployed app. No credentials or secrets are included.
